title: OpenStreetMap
summary: Community-built open map data project used as shared geographic infrastructure for many public-interest and Commons-adjacent applications.

aspects.label: Open data
aspects.description: The main public value is reusable map data under an open license.

evidence.label: OpenStreetMap copyright and license page
evidence.note: Used only as public provenance for this seed entry.

aspects.label: Community mapping
aspects.description: The project depends on distributed public contribution and maintenance.

aspects.label: Public infrastructure
aspects.description: The data can support navigation, civic mapping and educational use.

evidence.label: commonworld seed curation
evidence.note: Interpretive aspect assignment, not an endorsement claim.

location.label: Global digital project
location.privacy_note: Digital project; no single public point should be rendered.

provenance.summary: Seed entry using public official pages and conservative commonworld curation.

curation.notes: Public seed entry; no claim of affiliation or operational status beyond cited public pages.

requirements: No join, manage or decide action until a weltgewebe project identity exists.

aether.note: Global digital Commons appears in Aether without fake map coordinates.
